products.name: Avengers Infinity War S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Gamora 15 cm
products.description:
Guardians of the Galaxy's Gamora joins S.H.Figuarts! The figure includes both her sword and the knife she received from Thanos as a girl. Even better, the set comes with Star-Lord's blaster and bubble effect parts, letting you re-create the dramatic scene between the pair on Knowhere.

Set Contents: main body, two optional face parts, three left and two right optional hands, knife, optional hair part, Star-Lord blaster with bubble effect, sword, holster (for sword), stand

products.name: Saint Seiya PVC Statue Cosmo Memoir Pegasus Seiya 16 cm
products.description: From the anime/manga series "Saint Seiya" comes this officially licensed PVC Statue. It stands approx. 16 cm tall and comes in a printed box.

products.name: Birds of Prey S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Harley Quinn 15 cm
products.description:
From the upcoming Warner Brothers film "Birds of Prey (and the Fantabulous Emancipation of One Harley Quinn)," the titular Harley Quinn joins S.H.Figuarts! Her striking outfit is finished with realistic metallic colors and textures for on-screen accuracy. We've even replicated her individual tattoos! The figure includes two optional heads, three pairs of optional hands, a hammer, and roller-skates.

It stands approx. 15 cm tall and comes in a window box.

products.name: The Dark Knight S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Catwoman Tamashii Web Exclusive 15 cm
products.description: The fan-favorite Catwoman from the Batman: Dark Knight series joins S.H.Figuarts! Digital coloring enhances her realism. A perfect complement to the S.H.Figuarts Batman, released in January. S.H.Figuarts posability lets you capture dramatic scenes, including her riding pose! Includes optional hands, visor parts, and a pistol.

products.name: Paleontology World Museum Collection Series Bust Styracosaurus Brown Ver. 27 cm
products.description:
Dinosaurs are the most prominent species in the prehistoric world.

The DAMToys team has designed an accurate Styracosaurus skull after conducting extensive research. The facial texture and walking style of the Styracosaurus was analyzed to produce an accurate skin texture for collectors and dinosaur fans!

This is the perfect addition to your dinosaur collection!

The Polystone bust measures approx. 19 x 27 x 18 cm tall and comes with base in a printed box.

products.name: Batman Black & White Deluxe Statue Batman by Todd McFarlane (Version 2.0) 24 cm
products.description: After 15 years of celebrating diverse Batman art styles through the Batman Black & White statue line, DC Direct is proud to present a 2.0 of its 100th statue in the collection, by acclaimed writer and artist Todd McFarlane. This milestone statue is based on McFarlane's cover for BATMAN #423. As with the previous 99 statues in the series, McFarlane's design reinforces the core value of DC Direct's Batman Black & White line: to represent the printed page in 3-D form. The BATMAN BLACK & WHITE line brings to life interpretations of the World's Greatest Detective and select Gotham City characters from the comics industry's brightest stars. Please note: Due to the small edition size and the great demand for this item, allocations are possible.

products.name: Avengers Infinity War S.H. Figuarts Action Figure Falcon Tamashii Web Exclusive 15 cm
products.description:
Tamashii Nations is releasing S.H.Figuarts FALCON (Avengers: Infinity War)! Seamlessly transforms into flying mode and by using the detachable wing gears included. Includes 2 optional pair of hands, joint parts for Tamashii Stage, optional backpack for wings, an optional head, pair of holographic wings, and 2 exclusive weapons.

It stands approx. 15 cm tall and comes in a window box.

products.name: One Piece Variable Action Heroes Action Figure Luffy Taro 17 cm
products.description:
From MegaHouse´s ´Variable Action Heroes´ line comes this incredible PVC action figure of Nami from the popular anime series ´One Piece´.

The figure stands approx. 17 cm tall and features flexible PVC parts that allow you to display this beauty in many different poses.

products.description:

Set Contents: Main body, three optional heads, optional collar, five left and seven right optional hands, shield, damaged shield

products.name: PAN (SUPER HERO) S.H.Figuarts
products.description: Pan from the movie "Dragon Ball Super: SUPER HERO" has come to S.H.Figuarts! Included with interchangeable face parts and hand parts, you can recreate some of the most memorable poses from the movie. You can even recreate her pose from when she was training with Piccolo using the plastic bottles and the hands for holding them! The product includes a head part of Son Gohan for S.H.Figuarts Ultimate Gohan SUPER HERO (sold separately)! Bring back the scene of him smiling after his fierce battle!

products.name: Super Saiyan God Son Goku Saiyan God of Virtue S.H.Figuarts Dragon Ball Super
products.description: Dragon Ball Super Super Saiyan God Son Goku Saiyan God of Virtue S.H.Figuarts Action Figure:From Dragon Ball Super comes Goku's red Super Saiyan God form! The Dragon Ball Super Super Saiyan God Son Goku Saiyan God of Virtue S.H.Figuarts Action Figure measures approximately 5 1/2-inches tall. Kakarot includes 3x optional expressions and 4x pairs of optional hands to recreate epic, earthshattering battles!

products.name: Dragon Ball Z S.H.Figuarts Super Saiyan 3 Goku (Reissue)
products.description:
Super Saiyan 3 Goku joins S.H.Figuarts with an all new sculpt and tons of new features! The highly posable figure includes five pairs of optional hands, three optional expressions, and a custom stand.





Product Features

6.10 inches (15.5cm)
From Dragon Ball Z
Made of ABS and PVC
Highly poseable
Includes optional hands and expressions
Custom stand included







Box Contents

Super Saiyan 3 Goku figure
5 Optional hands
3 Optional expressions
Stand

products.name: SON GOKU DRAGON BALL GT ( KID GOKU ) S.H.FIGUARTS
products.description:
SON GOKU GT ( KID GOKU) S.H.FIGUARTS
THIS IS THE CHINA/JAPAN RELEASE


From "DRAGON BALL GT", "SON GOKU -GT-" in its smaller form due to the Ultimate Dragon Ball appears on S.H.Figuarts.
SON GOKU" from "DRAGON BALL GT" is a completely new sculpture incorporating the S.H.Figuarts DRAGON BALL Series compliant joint structure. Posing can be reproduced in the image of the play.

The "SON GOKU", which was made smaller by the Ultimate Dragon Ball in "DRAGON BALL GT", is now S.H.Figuarts with proportions and modeling inspired by the movie.



Height:


Approx. 80 mm
Material
PVC, ABS

Contents

Main body
3 interchangeable faces
5 pairs of interchangeable hands
Interchangeable head parts
Replacement dogi parts
Effect parts for Kamehameha wave

products.name: Dragon Ball GT S.H.Figuarts Super Saiyan 4 Vegeta
products.description:
From Tamashii Nations. Super Saiyan 4 Vegeta from Dragon Ball GT joins S.H.Figuarts!Super Saiyan 4 Vegeta, from Dragon Ball GT, has joined the S.H.Figuarts line!


From Dragon Ball GT, Super Saiyan 4 Vegeta is joining S.H.Figuarts!In the series, Vegeta attained this powerful form by absorbing a barrage Blutz Waves.

To give fans the power to pose Super Saiyan 4 Vegeta any way they like, this new figure has been designed with S.H.Figuarts' latest joints and modelling techniques!His shoulder and leg joints can be positioned to create a range of powerful, dynamic poses, and he's even been modeled in such a way that his voluminous hair doesn't interfere with moving his head and neck!
The figure also comes with a Final Shine Attack effect part!
Stand Super Saiyan 4 Vegeta on display alongside the separately sold S.H.Figuarts Super Saiyan 4 Goku to bring Dragon Ball GT to life before your very eyes!
Vegeta stands just under 6 inches tall, is highly articulated, and features several interchangeable parts for a wide variety of display options!


S.H.Figuarts SUPER SAIYAN 4 VEGETACompany：BANDAI SPIRITS CO., LTD.Target Age：For ages 15 and overSet includes：


Main Body
Three optional expression parts
Five pairs of optional hands
Final Shine Attack effect parts

products.name: Rebuild of Evangelion Pop Up Parade PVC Statue Rei Ayanami: Long Hair Ver. (3rd-run) 17 cm
products.description:
A rerelease of the POP UP PARADE figure of Rei Ayanami with long hair.

POP UP PARADE is a series of figures that are easy to collect with affordable prices and speedy releases! Each figure typically stands around 17-18cm in height and the series features a vast selection of characters from popular anime and game series, with many more to be added soon!
From the popular anime movie series "Rebuild of Evangelion" comes a rerelease of the POP UP PARADE figure of Rei Ayanami in her memorable long haired appearance from the movies.
Be sure to add her to your collection!

products.name: One Piece Chogokin Diecast Model Thousand Sunny 38 cm
products.description: The Straw Hat Pirates' ship, Thousand Sunny, joins the Chogokin series in a super-satisfying large scale -- 380mm long, and 230mm tall! This definitive collectible of the famed carrack ship incorporates a rotating Soldier Dog System and Gaon Cannon features, five mini-machines, and removable sidewalls to reveal the interior spaces within! It's a one of a kind portrayal fans won't want to miss. The set includes Shiro Mokuba 1, Mini Merry 2, Shark Submerge 3, Kurosai FR-U IV, Brachio Tank 5. Other accessories include an observation deck atop the mast, and a lever that can be inserted into the ship and moved. The crossbone parts act as a switch to open the Gaon cannon, and the Chicken Voyage rotates! Set includes the ship, the five mini-machines, stand, and two dummy covers.
